comment: Prebuilt, vendored Basis Universal codec modules. NEVER edit these artifacts; re-vendor from the pinned upstreams and update the hashes here.

basis_transcoder.js.version: three.js r185 (transcoder built by the three.js team from BinomialLLC/basis_universal, KTX2+Zstd, non-pthread)

basis_encoder.js.version: basis_universal v2_1_0r (official prebuilt web encoder, non-pthread single-thread build)

notes: Non-pthread builds only — no SharedArrayBuffer, no COOP/COEP headers required.

Both JS files are Emscripten MODULARIZE+UMD builds and BOTH export the SAME global factory name `BASIS`. Never load both into one scope naively; capture-and-delete the global between loads, or host them in separate workers.

Encoder (v2_1_0r) is newer than the transcoder (three r185). ETC1S / UASTC-LDR bitstreams are stable across these versions; if a decode incompatibility ever surfaces, swap the transcoder for webgl/transcoder/build/ from the same v2_1_0r tag.
Encoder ships to the EDITOR only. Player apps copy the transcoder pair only.
